note: Benign f32 frontier near-tie: after "A primary color is **red**" the reference distribution is a ~0.62/0.38 coin-flip between continuing the list ("**,") and closing ("**" -> "."). GPU reduction order (CUDA) closes; CPU/llama.cpp continue. Both are valid answers. NOT a correctness defect — the GPU decode is deterministic and bit-exact to the CPU reference on the confident probes (capital-of-France, say-hello, 2+2). Mirrors the documented 4B primary-color tie in the Windows x86 CPU bundles.
reference_llama_text: A primary color is **red**, **blue**, or **yellow**. These are the three basic colors used in color theory to create all other colors through mixing.
